query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS service_utilization_log (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  department_id INT NOT NULL,
  provider_type ENUM('laws_central', 'house_licensed') NOT NULL,
  provider_house_id INT,
  client_type ENUM('internal_house', 'internal_business', 'external') NOT NULL,
  client_house_id INT,
  client_business_id INT,
  client_external_id INT,
  service_package_id INT,
  invoice_id INT,
  description TEXT,
  hours_logged DECIMAL(6,2) DEFAULT 0,
  units_completed INT DEFAULT 1,
  unit_type VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'task',
  billable_amount DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
  service_date BIGINT NOT NULL,
  logged_by INT NOT NULL,
  notes TEXT,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL
);

  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  department_id INT NOT NULL,
  provider_type ENUM('laws_central', 'house_licensed') NOT NULL,
  provider_house_id INT,
  client_type ENUM('internal_house', 'internal_business', 'external') NOT NULL,
  client_house_id INT,
  client_business_id INT,
  client_external_id INT,
  service_package_id INT,
  invoice_id INT,
  description TEXT,
  hours_logged DECIMAL(6,2) DEFAULT 0,
  units_completed INT DEFAULT 1,
  unit_type VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'task',
  billable_amount DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
  service_date BIGINT NOT NULL,
  logged_by INT NOT NULL,
  notes TEXT,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL
);
